arts.ttl: Michael Carrick reveals if Middlesbrough will sign free agent defender amid injury crisis
arts.sum: Michael Carrick didn’t rule out Middlesbrough turning to the free agent market for a new centre-back if injuries to George Edmundson and Rav van den Berg prove serious, though he reiterated his satisfaction in his squad options. But Ayling has previously done well as a centre-back, while Jonny Howson is closing in on a return and cover there too.

arts.ttl: Derby County set to be missing five players for Middlesbrough clash
arts.sum: Both Matt Clarke and David Ozoh had to be replaced in the second half of Saturday's defeat to Millwall. Join our Derby County WhatsApp group to get the latest Rams headlines sent straight to your phone.

arts.ttl: Eiran Cashin responds after Derby County injury blow confirmed
arts.sum: Eiran Cashin and Nathaniel Mendez-Laing have expressed sympathy for Derby County midfielder David Ozoh after a thigh injury ended his season. Both Mendez-Laing and Cashin, who is now at Premier League Brighton, responded to the player's Instagram message in which he said the club would always have a place in his heart.

arts.ttl: Middlesbrough faithful will love Michael Carrick's message as they look to follow up Stoke win
arts.sum: Michael Carrick says he and his Middlesbrough players were quickly refocused on Derby County after Tuesday evening’s celebrations at Stoke City, with no risk of getting carried away in appreciating that one win counts for little. While Boro players enjoyed the post-match celebrations with the supporters who made the trip to Staffordshire at full-time, attentions were quickly turned to Saturday’s clash with Derby at the Riverside.

arts.ttl: Michael Carrick's mission as Middlesbrough's average attendances prove the clamour is still there - Eric Paylor
arts.sum: The key moments which gave Teesside supporters their pride back in their club followed the arrival of Bryan Robson and the early beginnings of the Golden Era. Boro moved to the brand new state-of-the-art Riverside Stadium just 12 months after Robson’s arrival, while the signing of the Brazilian superstar Juninho brought back the fans in their thousands overnight. Last season’s average of 26,905 was the highest since Boro spent one season in the Premier League under Aitor Karanka – and that was despite a massive chain of injuries ruining any promotion hopes which Carrick and the club may have held.

arts.ttl: Pundit 'can see' Blackburn Rovers ace playing for Derby County amid 'no way' contract verdict
arts.sum: It will be the first chance that Eustace will be able to put his stamp on the squad and Palmer told Football League World that he can see Derby putting Dolan in their crosshairs. Former England international Carlton Palmer can see John Eustace targeting a reunion with Blackburn star Tyrhys Dolan at Derby County this summer.
